summary.intent: Implement Phase 2.3 Composite Strategies (MeanReversionStrategy, MomentumStrategy, VolatilityStrategy, EnsembleStrategy) using TDD with a commit after each strategy.
summary.outcome: All 4 composite strategies implemented with 377 passing tests at 97% coverage; STRATEGIES.md and CLAUDE.md updated to reflect completion.

repo: backtest/validation.py uses validate_integer() not validate_positive_integer() for integer parameter validation
Signals are shifted by 1 day in all strategies to prevent look-ahead bias
warmup_period for composite strategies using multiple indicators is max() of component periods
EnsembleStrategy uses majority voting via configurable min_agreement threshold

code.finding: MeanReversionStrategy added after FibonacciRetracementStrategy; combines ta.momentum.RSIIndicator and ta.volatility.BollingerBands with AND logic for buy/sell signals
Validation functions available: validate_integer(), validate_price_data(column=...) — not validate_positive_integer() or validate_price_data(required_columns=...)
Warmup period assertions required checking actual strategy warmup values at runtime rather than hardcoding expected values

workflow: TDD pattern: write test file first, then implement, then run tests, then commit — enforced consistently across all strategies
ta library provides ROCIndicator in ta.momentum and AverageTrueRange in ta.volatility with inspectable parameters via Bash
Checking ta library internals via Bash (inspect.signature) is faster than fetching docs for parameter discovery

friction: Used wrong validation function name (validate_positive_integer instead of validate_integer) requiring a fix mid-implementation
Used wrong validate_price_data signature (required_columns instead of column) requiring another fix
EnsembleStrategy test had a typo requiring an edit before tests would run
EnsembleStrategy warmup period tests initially used hardcoded values that didn't match actual strategy warmup periods, requiring correction
Context window was exhausted mid-session (during MeanReversionStrategy implementation) requiring a summarized continuation
open_items: Phase 3: Walk-Forward Analysis not yet started
13 strategies implemented but no integration tests verifying strategies work end-to-end with the backtesting engine
EnsembleStrategy voting logic could be extended with weighted voting (currently equal weight per strategy)
